story.text:
# 💡 C70 · Crypto-Agility as Migration Readiness
**concept** · shared · knowledge

Durability is set by the ability to re-key to post-quantum before Z < X+Y — the path, not the wall. The trust graph uses primitives the way rivers use banks. Active (50%).
